name: Oron Group Investments & Holdings Ltd
summary: Oron Group Investments & Holdings Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the civil engineering, infrastructure, and construction businesses in Israel. The company constructs residential condominiums, including detached houses; and plans, executes, and manages engineering works, bridge construction, tunneling works, marine works, and public buildings, as well as offers solutions in the fields of construction and paving. It is also involved in the planning, construction, and management of industrial buildings, logistic centers, factories, storage buildings, and commercial centers; planning and execution of infrastructure projects, such as roads, bridges, and pumping stations; and development and execution of civil engineering and real estate projects. In addition, the company provides geotechnical works, such as geological survey drilling, groundwater monitoring, geological drilling, water pumping, stabilization and supporting slopes, energy absorbing networks, concrete spraying, vertical drains, tunneling works, dice injections, and jet grout works. Further, it manufactures and supplies quarry materials for the production of concrete and asphalt mixtures; and ready-mix concrete, cement mortar, kurkar clay, white clay, and asphalt mixtures, as well as offers bulk transportation services. Oron Group Investments & Holdings Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Beer Sheva, Israel.
